en: [[5]]s after the battle starts, summons Radiant Life to restore [[3]] [[weakest]] allied heroes' max HP by [[7%]] every [[10]]s.
zh: 从战斗开始第[[5]]秒起，每隔[[10]]秒，召唤生命之光，为[[最虚弱的]][[3]]名己方英雄回复[[7%]]最大生命值。

en: Increases the healing amount to [[10%]] of max HP.
zh: 回复量提升至[[10%]]最大生命值。

en: Increases the number of allies receiving this buff to [[4]].
zh: 作用目标数量提升至[[4]]名。
